spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Generous spacing. Use p-8 to p-16 for containers. Let the property images breathe. Never fill 100% of the grid perfectly.

grid_modes.gallery: Bento 'Tetris' grid. Mix col-span-full, col-span-4, and col-span-2 to create asymmetry.
grid_modes.dashboard: Strict grid hierarchy, dense and compact spacing. grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 gap-6

spacing_and_layout.hero_overlay: Max overlay opacity: bg-black/30 or gradient overlay bg-gradient-to-t from-black/60 via-black/20 to-transparent. Never go darker to keep image visible.

surfaces.header: Crystal Glass: backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/80 backdrop-saturate-150 with a 1px delicate bottom border border-black/5
surfaces.property_cards: Flat background, 1px subtle border border-stone-200, no shadow initially. On hover: -translate-y-1, shadow-lg, border color darkens.
surfaces.booking_widget: Solid white background, rounded-lg, shadow-[0_8px_32px_rgba(0,0,0,0.08)], p-6 or p-8. Sticky on desktop.

interactions_and_motion.scrolling: Use lenis for smooth momentum scrolling on marketing pages.
interactions_and_motion.hover_states: Images scale up slightly (scale-105 transition-transform duration-500) inside overflow-hidden containers. Buttons invert colors.
interactions_and_motion.page_transitions: Subtle fade and slide-up (translate-y-4 to 0) for lists and grids.
interactions_and_motion.accessibility: Respect prefers-reduced-motion. High contrast focus states.

components_strategy.buttons: rounded-none or rounded-sm for a high-end editorial feel. Primary button uses #4A5D23.
components_strategy.forms: Use Shadcn Input/Select. Flat design, no heavy drop shadows on inputs.
components_strategy.date_picker: Shadcn Calendar component inside a Popover. Do not use native HTML input type='date'.
components_strategy.modals: Auth modal uses Shadcn Dialog. Backdrop blur on the overlay.

hero_carousel.description: White luxury concrete villa with pool

room_categories.description: Sophisticated bedroom design with blue walls

lifestyle_and_testimonials.description: Couple holding hands by the pool

testing_rules.data_testid: MANDATORY for all interactive elements (buttons, links, form inputs, booking widgets). Format: kebab-case. Example: data-testid='book-now-button'.

instructions_to_main_agent: You have .js files not .tsx file, so write components in .jsx/.js format.
Use pure HTML/Tailwind for marketing layout structures to maintain asymmetric flexibility, and Shadcn only for interactive logic components.
Never use generic sans for headings. Apply Cormorant Garamond via font-serif.
Do not use generic 'blue' for active states. Keep within the organic earthy palette.
Ensure 'data-testid' is attached to every single interactive UI node.
Use the exact URLs from media_urls; do not substitute with dummyimage.com or via.placeholder.com.
